data.body: 重载 framebuffer_t 的 pixel 方法即可

data.title: 内部提供显示接口
data.body:
目前的实现为将渲染结果保存在内存中，库内部不提供显示接口。

目标：同时支持 sdl2 和 opengl 的显示，加一层抽象实现

data.title: 将 sdl 替换为 opengl

data.issueTitle: The total energy never stop increasing
Object goes out of shape while increasing the Young's modulus

data.title: 在 osx 下无法正常执行 lcov


data.content: After last week's 33-commit token-renaming marathon, you've crashed to zero commits and pivoted to SimplePhysicsEngine — because why finish one Simple-XX project when you can start another? Two PRs and one issue with no code is the physics engine equivalent of drawing free body diagrams and calling it research.

Week two of the SimplePhysicsEngine era and still zero commits — just 2 PRs, 2 issues, and 4 comments, which means you're now a full-time physics engine commenter rather than a physics engine developer. At this velocity, gravity will have reversed before you ship a feature.

Third consecutive week on SimplePhysicsEngine with zero commits — you've opened 6 more issues though, so at least the issue count is experiencing acceleration even if the codebase isn't. Newton's First Law applies here: a project at rest stays at rest unless acted upon by an actual commit.
